title: A clinical trial to study the effect of N-acetyl cysteine (NAC)in patients with pulmonary tuberculosis
condition: Newly detected sputum positive pulmonary tuberculosis,
inclusion_criteria: Adult males or females who completed 18 years,detected to have sputum positive pulmonary tuberculosis, willing to take Anti tuberculous treatment under RNTCP - DOTS strategy
exclusion_criteria: 1) Co-existing chronic lung disease, 2) Pregnancy, 3) Patients not willing to enroll in DOTS, 4) Anemia other than nutritional anemia.
locations: CHAD Tb Unit, Dept. of Community Medicine, CMC-Bagayam, Vellore
